title: Tommy's Better Anvil
description: Enhances the looking of Anvil, make it look like the real-life one
body:
## 📖 Intro
Vanilla has a **_Lot_** things that are suck, including the anvil. So now it's the moment, to introduce you to the:
# 😃 Tommy's Better Anvil (Resourcepack)
This Resourcepack enhances the look of the anvil.\
The vanilla one:\
![Vanilla anvil](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9645e4f1d97b9271a6b58894fabf9751895a26b0.png)\
The **Enhanced one:**\
![Enhanced anvil](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a6864e8b2b6971540b565229d9314d473d6b292.png)
## 🐛 What if I discovered bugs?
Join our discord and report it!\
Invite link: [TommyNerd Modrinth](https://discord.gg/BpAtbHJa)
## ◀️ Backport plans?
_Currently (that means maybe I'll do it in the future)_, there's no plans for backporting
